chinese_news.title: 科氪 | 性能操控赛主机、续航全能超旗舰，「颗秒神器」一加 Ace 6 至尊版正式发布！
chinese_news.summary: 2026年4月28日，一加正式发布「颗秒神器」一加 Ace 6 至尊版。作为游戏性能旗舰最强之选，一加 Ace 6 至尊版搭载当代旗舰芯天玑9500移动平台，并独家写入一加自研芯片级游戏技术——全新一代「风驰游戏内核」，以持续满帧的165超高帧、颗秒级精准的最强触控、感官更沉浸的满配战术工具，重新定义行业最强射击游戏体验。一加 Ace 6 至尊版配备旗舰同款「冰河散热系统」、同档领先的 8600mAh 超巨量「冰川电池」 + 120W 超级闪充组合，首发自研OPPO冰川电池聚能芯片，支持IP66/IP68/IP69/IP69K满级防尘防水，并搭载超流畅更 AI 的新一代ColorOS 16，以枪神形态全面出击。同时，一加首发行业首款「触按融合」射击游戏专属手柄——「一加枪神游戏手柄」，带来区别于外挂肩键、拉伸手柄和传统手机肩键的全新操控方案，解锁新机双形态体验，为玩家打造「枪神梦想装备」。

chinese_news.title: 早期项目 | 德国宇航局工程师创业，让硬件开发进入“vibe时代”
chinese_news.summary:
“传统工业软件太难用了。”

这是Orthogonal的创始人吉洋和他身边一大批工业界同行的共同感受。

“AI时代，软件开发已经可以用Cursor做vibe coding了，而硬件设计还停留在原始社会”吉洋在接受硬氪采访时表示，达索、ANSYS等巨头构建的，是一个由高昂授权费和极陡学习曲线砌成的“高墙”，Orthogonal想做的，是把“vibe”的方式带入硬件开发。

Orthogonal创始人吉洋曾在德国宇航局（DLR）及工业界深耕了近二十年，参与过达索系统仿真工具核心功能的研发，领导了空客A350宽体客机电气系统的研发，并在库卡、宝马、西门子高速列车、中国商飞、华为、中国航空发动机集团等全球知名企业的合作项目中担任过领导或关键角色。2023年因其在科研和创业领域的贡献，被慕尼黑工业大学授予“TUM Ambassador”荣誉称号。

在他看来，AI带来的不仅是简单的效率提升，更是一次重构工业软件范式的机会，传统工具的复杂性已经成为行业发展的瓶颈。

“AI时代

chinese_news.title: 一家AI原生健康硬件公司完成近亿元融资，韶音、甘洁出手，高秉强投过｜硬氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
作者｜黄楠

编辑｜袁斯来

硬氪获悉，AI原生健康硬件公司「杉木SHANMU」近日完成近亿元A轮融资，本轮由石溪资本（兆易创新旗下战投基金）领投，韶音科技、博将资本、涌铧投资、上海天使会等多家机构联合参投，老股东甘洁教授旗下知行一号基金和万物为资本追加本轮投资。庚辛资本为本轮财务顾问。

此前公司已获得多家机构加持，包括高秉强教授、松禾资本、启赋资本、浩方创投、北大张海霞教授旗下ICANX基金等。本轮资金将用于旗下DTC消费医疗产品的上市进程、推进B端定制化模块的交付落地，以及开展国内外医疗注册证的申报工作。

家用健康检测并非新的叙事。过去二十年，血糖仪、血压计、尿酸仪早已进入家庭，但其底层逻辑从未改变：始终停留在 “用户主动发起、单点采集、切片式截面数据” 的模式。

这是一条从医院平移至家庭的执行链路，繁琐的操作流程让用户长期依从性极低，“有创伤、记不住、嫌麻烦”难以坚持使用，最终让本应发挥健康管理价值的仪器，沦为家中散落里的闲置品。

与此同时，可穿戴设备的边界也已清晰。智能

chinese_news.title: 五月，适合想清楚一件事｜幕启
chinese_news.summary:
图源：公众号「有三思  U  Sense」

5月4日，一个被默认为“青年专属”的日期。

但在我看来，“青年”一词从来不只和年龄挂钩，每一个还在试探人生的节拍与正轨的人，身体里都住着一位渴望力量的青年。

[1]

chinese_news.title: 豆包将在免费模式外新增付费订阅，推出三档月包/年包价格｜最前线
chinese_news.summary:
近日，豆包App Store页面出现付费版本服务声明。声明称，为更好地服务专业用户，豆包将在免费版的基础上，推出包含更多增值服务的付费版本。同时，该页面还披露了三档订阅价格：标准版连续包月每月68元（连续包年688元）、加强版连续包月每月200元（连续包年2048元）、专业版连续包月每月500元（连续包年5088元）。

chinese_news.title: 科氪 | 张雪机车再夺冠军！荣耀宣布推出张雪机车冠军联名款手表
chinese_news.summary: 在2026世界超级摩托车锦标赛（WSBK）匈牙利站WorldSSP组别第一回合正赛中，中国摩托车制造商张雪机车的法国车手瓦伦丁·德比斯通过最后时刻的反超绝杀夺得冠军。赛后，荣耀CEO李健发文祝贺，并宣布作为张雪机车WSBK的首席战略合作品牌，荣耀将推出双方的冠军联名款手表，以庆祝这一夺冠时刻。 此前在4月初，荣耀已正式成为张雪机车WSBK首席战略合作品牌。荣耀首席营销官关海涛曾代表品牌向车队赠送荣耀WIN系列手机及荣耀WIN游戏本，寄望该系列产品能为车手带来胜利。荣耀此次通过与冠军联名，旨在借助国际赛事热度与效应，进一步提升品牌在年轻用户群体及运动场景中的影响力。 5月2日消息，在刚刚结束的2026世界超级摩托车锦标赛（WSBK）匈牙利站WorldSSP组别第一回合正赛中，中国摩托车制造商张雪机车的法国车手瓦伦丁·德比斯，最后时刻反超绝杀，强势夺冠。 赛后，荣耀CEO李健发文祝贺张雪机车夺冠，称这是一场“让所有观众都无比骄傲的比赛”。 与此同时，李健还宣布，作为张雪机车WSBK的首席战略合作品牌，荣耀将推出与张雪机车的冠军联名款手表，来庆祝这个历史性的夺冠时刻。

chinese_news.title: 卓驭于贝贝：向物理AI转型，是生存法则的必然选择 | 最前线
chinese_news.summary:
文｜肖漫

编辑｜李勤

当下的智能汽车领域，物理 AI 已成为高频词汇，绝大多数智能驾驶算法厂商都在往“物理AI”转型。

卓驭在北京车展上也发布了面向移动物理 AI 的原生多模态基础模型。在卓驭科技副总裁于贝贝看来，算法厂商向物理AI转型不是为了迎合资本市场而编织的想象空间，而是一条关乎厂商存亡的生存法则。

“如果不上这条技术路线，很可能今后就跑不出来了。”于贝贝说。

在新的竞争维度上，算法厂商的对手不再仅仅是曾经的同行，还包括那些从数字 AI 领域跨界而来的巨头、具身智能公司等。

这场全新的竞赛让算法厂商进入全新维度的淘汰赛中，而此次能真正跑出来的玩家，其商业空间也将随着打开。

基于移动基座模型，卓驭已经开始尝试打破传统Tier 1“卖硬件、收开发费”的单一逻辑。在第二增长曲线中，通过将乘用车技术拓展至 Robotaxi、RoboVan 等 L4 级领域，卓驭正在探索一种基于订阅、利润分成以及“动作令牌（Action Token）”的新商业形态。

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Bitcoin trade above $85,000 by end of June 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: BTC at $81K with momentum; Michael Saylor's potential MicroStrategy sale could trigger volatility but also tests conviction among institutional holders.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk: Bitcoin tops $81,000 as Strategy mulls selling its BTC to fund dividend obligations; crypto derivatives convergence with Wall Street.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Novo Nordisk stock outperform pharma sector by 15%+ through December 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Novo Nordisk +6% on Wegovy pill forecast beat; oral GLP-1 adoption curve now visibly accelerating, not yet fully priced in by consensus.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: Novo Nordisk raises 2026 outlook after Wegovy pill sales smash forecasts.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will AMD stock price exceed $220 by September 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: AMD +15% on data center revenue beat and guidance raise; AI infrastructure capex cycle is early-innings and chip scarcity narratives favor advanced node suppliers.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: AMD's stock soars 15% as data center growth pushes revenue and guidance past estimates.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Iran and US complete a new nuclear framework agreement by December 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Trump pausing Strait of Hormuz military ops and citing 'Iran deal progress'; China hosting Iran's top diplomat suggests diplomatic channel momentum.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: Trump pauses U.S. bid to guide ships out of Strait of Hormuz, cites Iran deal progress; China hosts Iran's top diplomat.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will FSB or major regulator announce new private credit supervision rules by September 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: $2 trillion private credit boom now triggering watchdog warnings; regulatory capture risk is real but so is systemic stability pressure.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: Private credit's $2 trillion boom raises global stability fears, watchdog warns.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Ethereum trade above $4,000 on any day before August 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: ETH remains correlated to BTC momentum but lacks dedicated catalyst narratives; Dencun/Pectra upgrades and restaking TVL growth are under-telegraphed to non-crypto finance crowds.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Crypto derivatives convergence with Wall Street + institutional adoption of ETH derivatives; no major English or Chinese media has called an ETH-specific bull case yet.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Samsung stock price exceed ₩100,000 (approximately USD $77) by December 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Samsung Electronics (005930.KS) closing price on Korea Exchange
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Samsung just crossed $1T valuation on AI frenzy (+15% recent rally) but consensus still treats memory/display as cyclical; chiplet expansion and AI accelerator positioning under-capitalized.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC: Samsung crosses $1 trillion valuation as AI frenzy drives historic rally; eightfold Q1 operating profit increase signals sustainable cycle, not one-off.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the US financial regulator (SEC/OCC/Federal Reserve) issue formal guidance on crypto derivatives or stablecoins by June 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: SEC.gov / Federal Register / OCC Bulletin feed
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CoinDesk reports crypto derivatives have converged with Wall Street; structured products and equity perps are imminent—regulators cannot stay silent. Trump administration is lighter-touch but market scale forces action.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk: Crypto derivatives have converged with Wall Street. Equity perps could soon prove it; no formal guidance yet published.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will any major AI lab (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google DeepMind, xAI) announce a model cheaper than $0.01 per million tokens (input) by November 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Official pricing pages (openai.com, anthropic.com, deepmind.google.com, x.ai) or press release
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: SenseTime (China) is shifting toward lower-cost models as competitive imperative; Western labs will follow. Pricing compression narrative exists but timeline is underestimated.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC: In the global AI race, a sanctioned Chinese firm says cheaper models can still win; no Western incumbent has announced sub-$0.01 pricing yet.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Bitcoin mining be legalized or formally permitted in Colombia by July 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Colombia Ministry of Finance/Energy official decree or presidential statement
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Colombian president explicitly said Bitcoin mining could transform Caribbean coast; energy surplus and geopolitical alignment favor quick regulatory approval. No English media has tracked local legislative progress.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Cointelegraph: Colombian president says Bitcoin mining could transform country's Caribbean coast; nascent narrative, high information asymmetry.

investment_theses.thesis: Broad-based AI chip demand (NVDA, AMD, MU) will outpace macro headwinds through 2026; private equity capital inflow into private credit will seize yield opportunities before rates fall.
supporting_signals: AMD +15% on data center beat; CNBC reports AI boom 'just getting started'.
Samsung $1T valuation on AI frenzy; eightfold profit increase signals structural, not cyclical, uplift.
Private credit $2 trillion boom and FSB watchdog warning confirm asset class is live and pricing in tail risk.
CoinDesk reports crypto derivatives convergence with Wall Street, implying institutional re-allocation underway.
investment_theses.counter_view: Nvidia valuation already reflects consensus AI upside; AMD margins may compress if competition from Intel/China (SenseTime) intensifies faster than expected. Private credit regulatory crackdown could trigger sudden deleveraging.
investment_theses.expression: Long SMH (semiconductor ETF) or equal-weight basket of NVDA, AMD, MU; short high-yield spreads (HYG or LQD calls) as hedge against private credit repricing.

investment_theses.thesis: Bitcoin consolidation above $81K signals institutional accumulation before mid-year rebalance; MicroStrategy's potential asset sale would paradoxically 'inoculate' BTC by reducing single-holder tail risk, attracting long-term allocators.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: Bitcoin holds $81K amid flat derivatives markets; Saylor explicitly says sale could 'inoculate' the market.
Trump pausing Strait of Hormuz ops suggests geopolitical de-escalation = lower energy volatility = cleaner risk-on environment for BTC.
Crypto derivatives convergence with Wall Street (CoinDesk) implies institutional plumbing is live; perps and structured products now accessible to traditional finance.
investment_theses.counter_view: MicroStrategy sale at $81K would dump 120K+ BTC on market; even if framed as 'inoculation,' liquidation cascade could trigger $70K retest. Macro: Fed hawkishness re-emergence or recession signals flip sentiment instantly.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC spot (via IBIT, GBTC) with tight stop at $75K; short MicroStrategy equity (MSTR) as hedge to isolate BTC macro exposure.

investment_theses.thesis: Pharmaceutical mega-caps with oral GLP-1 franchises (Novo Nordisk) will re-rate upward as real-world Wegovy pill adoption data flows in; market is pricing 2025 approval as sunk cost, not 2026 acceleration.
supporting_signals: Novo Nordisk +6% on FY2026 outlook raise tied to Wegovy pill sales beat; oral form eliminates injection friction.
No comparable English-language media coverage of GLP-1 oral segment maturation yet; information asymmetry is high.
Obesity prevalence globally + insurance coverage expansion in 2026 will drive volume beyond current Street estimates.
investment_theses.counter_view: GLP-1 competition from Eli Lilly (Mounjaro/Zepbound) and smaller players (Viking Therapeutics) will compress pricing and margins faster than consensus assumes. Regulatory risk on long-term cardiovascular safety if real-world data emerges.
investment_theses.expression: Long Novo Nordisk (NVO) or European pharma index (EDHX) with 9–12 month horizon; pair-trade short Eli Lilly (LLY) if market prices them as structural winner.

investment_theses.thesis: Eurozone energy stress (Lufthansa +$2B fuel costs) combined with geopolitical risk premium (Middle East, Ukraine) will keep EUR/USD range-bound but volatility-elevated; DXY will oscillate 102–106 through mid-2026.
supporting_signals: Lufthansa explicitly citing $2B fuel cost headwind from Middle East conflict; German airline is eurozone sentiment canary.
BBC reports Strait of Hormuz standoff raises war risk; Trump pause on Hormuz ops is tactical, not strategic de-escalation.
Ukrainian frontline city supply cuts (BBC) = war-economy tax on European logistics and commodity prices persisting.
investment_theses.counter_view: Trump and Iran deal progress could trigger sudden geopolitical relief rally (USD weakness, commodity downside); Lufthansa guidance miss could accelerate eurozone growth concerns and force ECB rate cuts sooner than priced.
investment_theses.expression: Long USD/JPY (safe-haven carry) or short EUR/USD with options straddle to capture volatility; short Lufthansa (LHA) as idiosyncratic European stress indicator.

investment_theses.thesis: Chinese AI competition (SenseTime, ByteDance Doubao, et al.) is shifting toward cheaper, multimodal models; Western labs will race to match pricing but sacrifice margin. Expect AI service provider ETFs (SOXX, XLK) to underperform BTC and crypto during 2026H2.
supporting_signals: CNBC: SenseTime shifting toward lower-cost models and overseas expansion to compete despite US sanctions.
36Kr: Doubao (ByteDance) is expanding paid subscription tiers, signaling confidence in Chinese user monetization moat.
CoinDesk: 'Computer Use is 45x more expensive than structured APIs'—cost structure matters; cheaper inference = race to the bottom.
No English media has connected China's pricing war to Western AI margin compression yet; information lag is 2–4 weeks.
investment_theses.counter_view: Western AI labs (OpenAI, Anthropic) have higher switching costs and brand loyalty; customers will pay premium for safety/reliability. Chinese models face trust, regulatory, and data sovereignty barriers in Western enterprise.
investment_theses.expression: Short NVDA / SMH (overweight to inference margin compression) and long QQQ with 6-month hedge via short AI-specific ETFs or long BTC as alternative upside narrative.
